---
title: "Korea’s Soft Power and Public Diplomacy Under Moon Jae-In Administration: A Window of Opportunity"
date: 2017-12
author:
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
categories: [public diplomacy, Korea, 2017]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan*</strong> (2017), “Korea’s Soft Power and Public Diplomacy Under Moon Jae-In Administration: A Window of Opportunity,” in Kadir Jun Ayhan (ed.) <em>Korea’s Soft Power and Public Diplomacy</em> (pp. 13-32), Hangang Network <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/321874044_Korea's_Soft_Power_and_Public_Diplomacy"><code>link</code></a>
#image:
#draft: true
---

## Information

I organized a graduate student conference/ article contest with support (grant) from Ministry of Foreign Affairs. Then, I collected the articles in this volume.

## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@incollection{ayhan_koreas_2017,
    location = {Seoul},
    title = {Korea’s Soft Power and Public Diplomacy Under Moon Jae-In Administration: A Window Of Opportunity},
    url = {https://www.researchgate.net/publication/321874044_Korea's_Soft_Power_and_Public_Diplomacy},
    pages = {13--32},
    booktitle = {Korea's Soft Power and Public Diplomacy},
    publisher = {Hangang Network},
    author = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun},
    editor = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun},
    date = {2017},
    note = {Type: Book Section},
}
```
